About us

The Story Behind Bhawana

Hi, I’m a passionate designer and IT student from Nepal, focused on turning ideas into meaningful visual experiences. I specialize in graphic design, social media content, and UI/UX design, where creativity meets strategy. My work is not just about making things look good — it’s about communicating clearly, building trust, and solving real problems through design. Coming from a humble background, I’m highly driven to grow my skills and create opportunities for myself. I believe in consistency, self-learning, and real-world projects as the best way to improve.
